seoTitle: Hogarth Range vs Holbrook — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hogarth Range and Holbrook. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hogarth Range vs Holbrook: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hogarth Range and Holbrook.
heading: Hogarth Range vs Holbrook — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hogarth Range, New South Wales and Holbrook, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Holbrook has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Hogarth Range (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hogarth Range or Holbrook safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hogarth Range has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Holbrook scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hogarth Range scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Holbrook scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hogarth Range or Holbrook?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Holbrook has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
